meaning: n.取回,恢复,再开始,重获,(中断后)再继续
examples: We are hoping for an early resumption of peace talks.
It is premature to speculate about the resumption of negotiations.
The resumption of talks is indicative of an improving relationship between the two countries.
On the resumption, Ponty quickly increased their lead with an easy penalty from Davey.
Moreover, the resumption in deep water drilling has the immediate effect of increasing consumption.
